full_name.selector: main section:has(a[href*='contact-info']) h1, main section:has(a[href*='contact-info']) h2, main h1

pic_url.selector: main div[aria-label='Profile photo'] img, main .pv-top-card-profile-picture__image--show, [data-testid='profile-photo'] img

location.selector: main div:has(> p > a[href*='contact-info']) > p:first-of-type, main [data-view-name='profile-top-card-location']

company.selector: main div[role='button']:has(svg[id*='company']) p, main section[componentkey*='Topcard'] a[href*='/company/'] p

university.selector: main div[role='button']:has(svg[id*='school']) p, main section[componentkey*='Topcard'] a[href*='/school/'] p

multipleCompany.selectorSpan: main [data-testid*='ExperienceTopLevelSection'] ul li > span, main #experience + div + div ul li:nth-of-type(1) ul li > span
multipleCompany.selector: main a[href*='/company/'] p:first-of-type, main li a[href*='/company/'] p

x.com.full_name: div[data-testid='User-Name'] > div > div > a > div > div > span > span
